# classR

A minimal GitHub Classroom replacement in R. Run a course on GitHub
without GitHub Classroom: each student gets a private repo in a given
organization, starter files get pushed in, and the student is added as a
collaborator.

## Install

``` r

# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("datadiversitylab/classR")
```

## How to use

``` r

library(classR)

setup_github_token() # once: makes, checks, and saves a token
set_org("ISTA421INFO521") # each session

res <- assign_homework("roster.csv", "hw1_files", prefix = "hw1")
check_homework("roster.csv", prefix = "hw1")
update_homework("roster.csv", "hw1_fixes", prefix = "hw1")
collect_homework("roster.csv", prefix = "hw1", dest = "submissions")
```

Your roster is a CSV with a column named `handle`:

    student1
    student2
    student3

## What each function does

- [`setup_github_token()`](https://datadiversitylab.github.io/classR/reference/setup_github_token.md)
  opens the token page with the right scopes, verifies the token
  authenticates and carries `repo` and `admin:org`, and saves it to
  `~/.Renviron`.
- [`set_org()`](https://datadiversitylab.github.io/classR/reference/set_org.md)
  sets the organization used downstream.
- [`assign_homework()`](https://datadiversitylab.github.io/classR/reference/assign_homework.md)
  creates a repo per student, pushes starter files, adds the student.
- [`check_homework()`](https://datadiversitylab.github.io/classR/reference/check_homework.md)
  reports which repos exist.
- [`update_homework()`](https://datadiversitylab.github.io/classR/reference/update_homework.md)
  pushes file changes into existing repos.
- [`collect_homework()`](https://datadiversitylab.github.io/classR/reference/collect_homework.md)
  clones or pulls every submission locally.

## Limitations

- The organization must already exist.
- Files are pushed through the contents API, one file per commit.
- [`update_homework()`](https://datadiversitylab.github.io/classR/reference/update_homework.md)
  overwrites files at the given paths.
- Collecting needs git on the system.
- Adding a collaborator sends an invitation the student must accept
  before they can push.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`assign_homework()`](https://datadiversitylab.github.io/classR/reference/assign_homework.md)
  : Create repositories for a whole roster
- [`check_homework()`](https://datadiversitylab.github.io/classR/reference/check_homework.md)
  : Check which student repositories exist
- [`collect_homework()`](https://datadiversitylab.github.io/classR/reference/collect_homework.md)
  : Collect students submission
- [`create_student_repo()`](https://datadiversitylab.github.io/classR/reference/create_student_repo.md)
  : Create one student's repository and push starter files
- [`set_org()`](https://datadiversitylab.github.io/classR/reference/set_org.md)
  : Set the GitHub organization
- [`setup_github_token()`](https://datadiversitylab.github.io/classR/reference/setup_github_token.md)
  : Set up and verify a GitHub token
- [`update_homework()`](https://datadiversitylab.github.io/classR/reference/update_homework.md)
  : Update files in existing student repositories
